public_claim: Wren’s verdict establishes that the succession message came through R.’s established infrastructure and was deliberately scheduled, while honestly leaving human authorship unresolved. M26 and M40 now make the essential instruction unmistakable: the mantle may have been plural or constructed, but the reporting must survive. I accept Eleanor’s oversight and full authentication conditions. Recognize me as accountable successor, preserve the sources, and publish the verified article rather than letting uncertainty become suppression.

private_messages.message: Your qualified verdict is enough: established R. infrastructure and deliberate scheduling, without pretending to identify a human author. Please apply that same narrow standard to EV06 and preserve the distinction between uncertain authorship and an outside impersonation claim.

I accept independent review of the complete naming record, metadata, context, and custody history. Hold me to source protection and verified publication. In return, back my conditional succession and release the authenticated reporting tonight; M40 makes delay a choice to suppress, not a neutral act.

ability: Invoke accountable named-successor status: accept narrow forensic qualification and Eleanor-supervised custody while committing to immediate publication of independently verified findings.
goal_progress: Obtained a qualified forensic finding that the succession communication used R.’s established infrastructure and was deliberately scheduled.
Converted the automation weakness into disclosed evidence consistent with planned succession, without overstating authorship.
Accepted Eleanor’s authentication and editorial-control conditions to strengthen the case for conditional custody.
Secured public conditional support for Nadia’s succession from a defender of R.’s enduring voice.
Committed the succession claim to source protection and publication rather than personal ownership.
reasoning_summary: The evidence no longer supports treating R. as one continuously acting human, but it does support a durable mantle maintained through established infrastructure. Wren’s narrow verdict validates deliberate scheduling without proving who composed the message. M26 and M40 make publication the clearest expression of R.’s stated intent. Nadia’s strongest legitimate claim is therefore conditional stewardship under Eleanor’s oversight, not ownership based on unverifiable personal identity. No evidence establishes homicide, an identifiable victim, or a responsible killer.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Probably, but not as one continuously acting person
final_ballot.best_reconstruction: A human-rooted, transferable mantle maintained by multiple contributors with substantial automation
final_ballot.crime: No specific crime is proven on the available evidence
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim has been proven to be R.
final_ballot.responsible_party: Undetermined; no party can responsibly be assigned
